body.title: D335: Extract Igor base class into utility closet substrate
body.result: Superseded by T-uc-base-class-extract (completed 2026-04-17). AgentBase extracted, IgorBase thin subclass.
body.description: Move IgorBase (logging, diagnostics, forensic logger) from wild_igor into the utility closet. Igor imports from there. External tools built on same substrate get logging for free. Enables: diagnostics available when Igor crashes, shared logging substrate for all agentic tools (copilot, minions, etc).
